framework.name: AP2 Mandate Architecture
framework.description: AP2 uses cryptographically-signed 'Mandates' (Intent Mandate → Cart Mandate) as tamper-proof digital contracts with verifiable credentials. Two modes: real-time (human present, signs cart) and delegated (human absent, pre-authorized rules). Creates non-repudiable audit trail for authorization, authenticity, and accountability.
framework.raw_quote: AP2 builds trust by using Mandates—tamper-proof, cryptographically-signed digital contracts that serve as verifiable proof of a user's instructions. These mandates are signed by verifiable credentials (VCs)

source.title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google Cloud Blog
